name: 16S_V9_Firmicutes
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V9 in phylum Firmicutes. Approximately 30 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 1435-1465). Gram-positive low-GC, dominant gut/skin; e.g. Bacillota, Clostridia, Bacilli. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
